subject: Bisharp, a tall bipedal creature with a helmet-like head featuring a pointed crest, black and red body with sharp blade protrusions, standing on rocky terrain
description: Bisharp dominates the frame in a commanding mid-shot against rocky elevated terrain. The figure is tall and imposing with a distinctive helmet-like head bearing a pointed red-and-black crest, broad shoulders with large flat blade-shaped protrusions, and a red-accented torso. Its stance is upright and dominant, suggesting authority rather than active combat. The background shows grey rocky cliffs or boulders under a pale muted sky. The color scheme is predominantly black, red, and silver, matching the metallic blade aesthetic carried over and amplified from its pre-evolution.
foreground: Bisharp standing in an upright commanding pose on rocky ground
background: grey rocky cliff face, pale muted sky
